title: Vivien Clauzon
text: Home * People * Vivien Clauzon Vivien Clauzon [1] Vivien Clauzon , a French software architect and applied mathematician holding a Ph.D. from Clermont-Ferrand II on the topic of computational fluid dynamics in 2008. He further elaborated on L∞ stability of the MUSCL method in the study of partial differential equations . As a computer chess programmer, Vivien Clauzon is author of the chess engines Weini and Minic .
